description: <onTransition from=.X> inverse directionality (§51.0.H Form 2). The handler is placed in the TARGET state-child (.Green) with `from=.Red`, so it fires on transitions arriving FROM .Red. A click writes @light = Light.Green (Red -> Green admitted by .Red.rule=.Green); the to-side handler fires once, @arrivals -> 1, engine -> Green.
rationale: §51.0.H `<onTransition from=.Variant>` placed in the target state-child fires on incoming transitions from that variant (to-side semantics, the inverse of the default leave-side `to=`). Red -> Green -> the from=.Red handler in .Green fires once -> @arrivals = 1.
